items.title: McDonald’s CEO is grappling with a ‘two-tier economy’ as he slashes prices on value meals—and signals backing for a minimum wage increase
items.description: “Particularly with middle- and lower-income consumers, they’re feeling under a lot of pressure right now,” Chris Kempczinski said on CNBC.

items.title: Value menus seem to be driving restaurant traffic
items.description: New data from Circana finds that 50% of consumers who have not recently dined out would be motivated to do so for lower prices

items.title: Chipotle Stock Is Down 30% This Year. Why There’s ‘Plenty Left in the Bowl’ for Investors.
items.description: Chipotle Mexican Grill  has a had a brutal year, but the bowl and burrito chain may be due for a rebound, says Rothschild & Co Redburn.  The firm upgraded Chipotle to Buy from Neutral in a Wednesday research note and left its $55 price target unchanged.  The upgrade did little to move Chipotle’s stock, which was up 0.2% to $41.82 on Wednesday, but that’s a decent day by 2025 standards.

items.title: McDonald’s CEO says Trump’s no tax on tips amplifies an ‘uneven playing field’ for its restaurants, which don’t get ‘customers to pay’ for labor
items.description: Chris Kempczinski raised concerns that restaurants paying tipped workers lower minimum wages were getting an extra boost from the White House’s new provision.

items.title: Taco Cabana is the latest chain to go after the late-night crowd
items.description: The TC After Dark Menu is available from 8 p.m. to 2 a.m.
